settings.heading_right: Dionne Husted: The Rest & The Appointment
settings.closing_quote: "We do not just create garments; we clothe the calling of a generation."

settings.text: Nancy Vuu's journey began in the world of bridal couture—crafting gowns that didn't merely adorn, but spoke to the identity of the woman wearing them. Each creation was an act of prophetic design, a garment that declared purpose before the wearer ever spoke a word.

In Dionne Husted, Nancy found not just a collaborator, but a kindred vision—a designer whose understanding of the male form possessed the same spiritual precision Nancy brought to the feminine silhouette.

In perfect alignment, Dionne received a vision of a girl in a garden, hearing the declaration: "Her name is Eden. I will find my rest in her." Then came the vision of a boy, Seth—a name meaning "The Appointed One."

When these two visions converged, Seth Eden was born. It is a house built on the intersection of Restoration and Authority. Every garment is crafted to reflect the "True Royalty" Nancy was called to champion, and the "Appointment" Dionne was shown.

settings.heading: Seth: The Mandate
settings.description: Vested in authority. Designed for those who lead with the heart of a steward.

settings.heading: Eden: The Sanctuary
settings.description: Silhouettes that release the peace of the Garden into the atmospheres of influence.

settings.heading: Recognition & Covenant.
settings.description: At Seth Eden, your garment is more than a fit—it is a recognition of your mandate. We offer two levels of precision, each designed to frame your identity.

settings.heading: Made-to-Measure
settings.description: The "Recognition" experience. Utilizing our signature architectural patterns as a foundation, we adjust to your specific dimensions. This journey involves two fittings and ensures the Seth Eden silhouette is flawlessly aligned with your frame.
settings.features: Signature Pattern Base|40+ Premium Fabric Choices|4-Week Delivery

settings.heading: Full Bespoke
settings.description: The "Covenant" experience. A unique pattern is hand-drafted specifically for you from a blank canvas. This is the absolute height of the Husted & Vuu house—incorporating infinite hand-stitch details and multiple skeletal fittings for total anatomical command.
settings.features: Hand-Drafted Individual Pattern|Exclusive Rare Textiles|10-Week Master Craft

settings.heading: Limited Designs
settings.description: A curation of "Seth Eden" inspirations available for immediate purchase at the atelier. These limited-release garments serve as the initial vision—an inspiration for the client to begin their customized tailoring journey.

settings.heading: The Reveal
settings.text: Explore our atelier inspirations in Napa or San Jose—the visual foundations of your identity.

settings.heading: The Consultation
settings.text: Collaborate with our designers to customize your mandated silhouette, choosing textures that reflect your unique calling.

settings.heading: The Appointing
settings.text: Your final fitting—the moment where your garment and your identity are unified in a bespoke appointment.
